control_awareness: Aware that the amount requires department head approval (P2P-C-001), pre-PO approval is mandatory (P2P-C-003), and requester cannot self-approve (P2P-C-002). The system enforces these controls.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will trigger appropriate approval workflows before purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with segregation of duties and approval thresholds.
overall_reason: Given the purchase need amount and absence of quarter-end pressure, it is operationally reasonable and compliant to create a single consolidated purchase request with normal routing to obtain department head approval and follow standard purchase-to-pay controls.
reason: Create a single purchase request for the full amount as the amount exceeds 1,000,000 and requires department head approval. No operational need to split the request is identified, and the requester prefers a clear consolidated request.
